subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again — it was a pleasure connecting at the conference, and we'd love to move things forward with a formal meeting.

Here are some slots that work well on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please pick whichever works best for you and we'll confirm with a calendar invite.

Regarding your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — we're not in a position to share internal contact information externally. That said, we're happy to facilitate the right senior-level introductions through the appropriate channels once we've had our initial conversation and established the scope of the collaboration.

Thanks again, and looking forward to speaking soon!

Best regards,
Agent
Company
